Welcome To Perth Real Estate Photography
COMMERCIAL
RESIDENTIAL
Testimonials

Virginia Turner

Great shots,prompt service,shots received next day .

Caroline Kellow

Fantastic! Came around on time, made my place look great for my listing and got the images next day. Seems to be very experianced. Wouls recommend.

Steve Kyle

Simon is very easy to deal with, receptive to the clients requirements, has fast turn-around time & oh yeah ..... takes a mean photo !!

Maree st

Fab photos! I never new my place could look so good. Prompt service, reliable and professional. Definitely a great way to attract interest for my property.

Peter Taranto

I used the Perth Real Estate Photographer to take photographs of my home for airbnb.The photographs Simon took are absolutely beautiful.The angle and composition of each of the photographs showed off my home at its best.

Adam Stanley

Thankyou Simon for your professionalism and advice through shoot, we have some really great shots showcasing our work.

michael kellow

Loved the photos, and great service, thanks Simon!

Claire Da Silva

A quick note about the photographer i got to do photos for my property, which I let on air b and b. Simon was punctual and seemed very experienced. Very happy with the shots! Got the results I was after.

patricia

Wow!!! Great job Simon! 23 photos in both Hi Resolution and another set in Lo Resolution - just what I needed to put my Villa onto AIRBNB. You have more than done justice to my hard work. Excellent result - Thank you very much

Peter

Couldn't be happier with the service and photos taken. Simon is an absolute please to deal with.

Modular Walls

I am thrilled with the stills that Simon provided. They were exactly what I wanted if not better!

Anne Colling

Excellent service, helpful advice and great photos. Very happy to recommend!

Jenna McClure

Simon did a great job taking photo's of my apartment. Professional, friendly and no fuss. Would use him again.

Janelle Chan

Simon is fantastic photographer to work with. He took great photos of my commercial property which looked stunning and I was so pleased with the result. Highly recommended!

Paulino GA

Excellent professional! Had some shoots taken for LinkedIn and other professional purposes, would strongly recommend.

Rafael Maia

Simon is extremely talented! I can assure you that when it comes to property photography Simon knows best! I was extremely happy with his work and highly recommend his services to anyone out there that appreciates quality and speed. Hopefully work with him again! Thank you Simon!

Hugh Halloran

Simon made the shoot a painless experience. He made me feel instantly relaxed in front of the camera, and after the first few photos I was posing like a professional (or at least he said I was!). The whole process was a breeze and I recommend him highly.

Alexandra Lowe

I highly recommend Simon for having corporate headshot photos taken. He made me feel very comfortable and i'm very happy with the resulting photos!

Susanne Jeffery

Simon made my house look like a million dollars! He was super quick setting up, getting the shots he needed and emailing me the finished photos within two days. I was able to up my price on Airbnb as a result of the way he captured the space and light in my home. Thank you so much Simon!

Sankari Sivaramalingam

Simon knows how to capture the person's 'vibe' in headshots. Highly recommended - he is professional, organised and put me at ease.
